purpose: Adapt legacy mp.solutions.* demos to mediapipe.tasks.vision.* so the user environment (video2txt conda env on mediapipe 0.10+) can run them without AttributeError.

references.why_relevant: Same MediaPipe 0.10 migration (v2) was already completed there — used as a reference pattern for choosing task classes, running mode, and model URLs.

references.topic: Tasks Python API entry point — class names (FaceDetector / HandLandmarker / PoseLandmarker / FaceLandmarker / ObjectDetector / ImageSegmenter) and import path (`from mediapipe.tasks.python import vision`).
Public CDN that hosts the .task / .tflite model files referenced by every demo's MODEL_URL; supports remote model_asset_path so models auto-download on first run.
RunningMode.VIDEO + detect_for_video(mp_image, timestamp_ms) is the recommended pattern for offline video / webcam streaming — replaces the legacy `process(rgb_frame)` API call.
80-class COCO label map hard-coded into object_detection.py so the Tasks ObjectDetector output (which lacks a built-in label map) can show human-readable names.
Canonical 21-landmark hand topology — pairs (0,1)→(3,4) thumb, (0,5)→(7,8) index, etc.; replicated inline as HAND_CONNECTIONS.
Canonical 33-keypoint pose topology used by PoseLandmarker; replicated inline as POSE_CONNECTIONS.
Original Face Mesh iris landmark indices (468..477) and IRIS_EDGES subset used for the legacy FACEMESH_IRISES drawing constant.
Selfie Multiclass 256x256 model: output category_mask where 0=background, 1=person (used by selfie_segmentation.py). Class index for hair in this model is not standardized across MediaPipe releases.
OpenCV reads BGR; MediaPipe Tasks expects SRGB. Conversion done via cv2.cvtColor(frame, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB) before wrapping into mp.Image.
